member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.TypecastException
member.summary: Base exception for all Typecast API errors.

member.name: P:Typecast.Exceptions.TypecastException.StatusCode
member.summary: The HTTP status code returned by the API.

member.name: P:Typecast.Exceptions.TypecastException.ResponseBody
member.summary: The raw response body from the API (if available).

member.name: M:Typecast.Exceptions.TypecastException.FromStatusCode(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an appropriate exception based on the HTTP status code.

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.BadRequestException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the request is malformed or invalid (HTTP 400).

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.PaymentRequiredException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the account has insufficient credits (HTTP 402).

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a requested resource is not found (HTTP 404).

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.UnprocessableEntityException
member.summary: Exception thrown when request validation fails (HTTP 422).

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.RateLimitException
member.summary: Exception thrown when rate limit is exceeded (HTTP 429).

member.name: T:Typecast.Exceptions.InternalServerException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a server error occurs (HTTP 5xx).

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.AgeEnumExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.AgeEnum)
member.summary: Converts the AgeEnum to its API string representation.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.AudioFormatExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.AudioFormat)
member.summary: Converts the AudioFormat to its API string representation.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.AudioFormatExtensions.ParseAudioFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to AudioFormat enum.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.AudioFormatExtensions.ToContentType(Typecast.Models.AudioFormat)
member.summary: Gets the MIME content type for the audio format.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.AudioFormatExtensions.ParseFromContentType(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a MIME content type to AudioFormat enum.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.EmotionPreset
member.summary: Available emotion presets for TTS synthesis.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.EmotionPresetExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.EmotionPreset)
member.summary: Converts the EmotionPreset to its API string representation.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.EmotionPresetExtensions.ParseEmotionPreset(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to EmotionPreset enum.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.GenderEnumExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.GenderEnum)
member.summary: Converts the GenderEnum to its API string representation.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.JsonStringEnumMemberConverter
member.summary: JSON converter that uses JsonPropertyName attribute for enum serialization.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.LanguageCodeExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.LanguageCode)
member.summary: Converts the LanguageCode to its ISO 639-3 string representation.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.LanguageCodeExtensions.ParseLanguageCode(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an ISO 639-3 string to LanguageCode enum.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.Output
member.summary: Audio output configuration for TTS synthesis.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.Output.AudioPitch
member.summary: Audio pitch adjustment in semitones (-12 to 12, default 0).

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.Output.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new Output with default values.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.Output.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{Typecast.Models.AudioFormat})
member.summary: Creates a new Output with specified values.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.Output.Validate
member.exception: Thrown when values are out of valid range.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.ITTSPrompt
member.summary: Base interface for all prompt types.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.Prompt
member.summary: Basic emotion prompt for ssfm-v21 model.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.Prompt.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new Prompt with default values.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.Prompt.#ctor(System.Nullable{Typecast.Models.EmotionPreset},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Creates a new Prompt with specified values.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.PresetPrompt
member.summary: Preset-based emotion prompt for ssfm-v30 model.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.PresetPrompt.EmotionType
member.summary: The emotion type (always "preset" for this prompt type).

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.PresetPrompt.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new PresetPrompt with default values.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.PresetPrompt.#ctor(System.Nullable{Typecast.Models.EmotionPreset},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Creates a new PresetPrompt with specified values.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt
member.summary: Smart context-aware emotion prompt for ssfm-v30 model. Uses surrounding text context to infer appropriate emotion.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt.EmotionType
member.summary: The emotion type (always "smart" for this prompt type).

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt.PreviousText
member.summary: Previous text context for emotion inference (max 2000 characters).

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt.NextText
member.summary: Next text context for emotion inference (max 2000 characters).

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new SmartPrompt with default values.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.SmartPrompt.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SmartPrompt with specified context.
member.param: Text that comes before the current text
Text that comes after the current text

member.name: F:Typecast.Models.TTSModel.SsfmV21
member.summary: SSFM version 2.1 - supports basic emotion presets.

member.name: F:Typecast.Models.TTSModel.SsfmV30
member.summary: SSFM version 3.0 - supports advanced emotion control including smart mode.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSModelExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.TTSModel)
member.summary: Converts the TTSModel to its API string representation.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSModelExtensions.ParseTTSModel(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to TTSModel enum.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSRequest.VoiceId
member.summary: The voice ID to use for synthesis.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSRequest.Language
member.summary: The language code for synthesis (optional, auto-detected if not specified).

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSRequest.Prompt
member.summary: Emotion/prompt configuration (optional). Use for ssfm-v21, or / for ssfm-v30.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Typecast.Models.TTSModel)
member.summary: Creates a new TTSRequest with required parameters.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSRequest.Validate
member.exception: Thrown when required fields are missing or invalid.
Thrown when values are out of valid range.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.AudioData
member.summary: The synthesized audio data as a byte array.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.Duration
member.summary: The duration of the audio in seconds.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.Format
member.summary: The format of the audio data.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.SaveToFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves the audio data to a file.
member.param: The path to save the audio file

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.SaveToFile(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the audio data to a file synchronously.
member.param: The path to save the audio file

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.ToStream
member.summary: Gets the audio data as a memory stream.
member.returns: A MemoryStream containing the audio data

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.TTSResponse.FileExtension
member.summary: Gets the suggested file extension for the audio format.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.UseCaseEnum
member.summary: Use case classification for voice filtering.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.UseCaseEnumExtensions.ToApiString(Typecast.Models.UseCaseEnum)
member.summary: Converts the UseCaseEnum to its API string representation.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.ModelInfo.Emotions
member.summary: List of emotions supported by this voice for this model.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoicesResponse.VoiceName
member.summary: The display name of the voice.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoicesResponse.Model
member.summary: The TTS model this voice supports.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoicesResponse.Emotions
member.summary: List of emotions supported by this voice.

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.VoiceV2Response
member.summary: Voice response from V2 API with enhanced metadata.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoiceV2Response.VoiceName
member.summary: The display name of the voice.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoiceV2Response.Models
member.summary: List of models this voice supports with their emotions.

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoiceV2Response.Age
member.summary: The age category of the voice (optional).

member.name: P:Typecast.Models.VoiceV2Response.UseCases
member.summary: Recommended use cases for this voice (optional).

member.name: T:Typecast.Models.VoicesV2Filter
member.summary: Filter options for V2 voices API.

member.name: M:Typecast.Models.VoicesV2Filter.ToQueryParameters
member.summary: Converts the filter to query parameters.

member.name: T:Typecast.TypecastClient
member.summary: Client for interacting with the Typecast Text-to-Speech API.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new TypecastClient using environment variables for configuration.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new TypecastClient with the specified API key.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.#ctor(Typecast.TypecastClientConfig)
member.summary: Creates a new TypecastClient with the specified configuration.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.TextToSpeechAsync(Typecast.Models.TTSRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: The TTS response containing audio data
member.exception: Thrown when the API returns an error

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.TextToSpeech(Typecast.Models.TTSRequest)
member.returns: The TTS response containing audio data
member.exception: Thrown when the API returns an error

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoicesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets available voices (V1 API - deprecated, use GetVoicesV2Async instead).

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoiceAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a voice by ID (V1 API - deprecated, use GetVoiceV2Async instead).

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoicesV2Async(Typecast.Models.VoicesV2Filter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets available voices with enhanced metadata (V2 API).
member.returns: List of available voices with metadata

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoicesV2(Typecast.Models.VoicesV2Filter)
member.summary: Gets available voices with enhanced metadata synchronously (V2 API).
member.returns: List of available voices with metadata

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoiceV2Async(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a voice by ID with enhanced metadata (V2 API).

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.GetVoiceV2(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a voice by ID with enhanced metadata synchronously (V2 API).

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases resources.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClient.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases resources.

member.name: T:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for the Typecast client.

member.name: F:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.ApiKeyEnvVar
member.summary: Environment variable name for API key.

member.name: F:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.ApiHostEnvVar
member.summary: Environment variable name for API host.

member.name: P:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: The Typecast API key. If not provided, will be read from TYPECAST_API_KEY environment variable.

member.name: P:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.ApiHost
member.summary: The Typecast API host URL. If not provided, will be read from TYPECAST_API_HOST environment variable or use the default.

member.name: P:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP timeout in seconds. Default is 30 seconds.

member.name: P:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.HttpClient
member.summary: Custom HttpClient to use for requests. If not provided, a new HttpClient will be created.

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.GetEffectiveApiKey
member.summary: Gets the effective API key, falling back to environment variable if not set.
member.exception: Thrown when no API key is configured

member.name: M:Typecast.TypecastClientConfig.GetEffectiveApiHost
member.summary: Gets the effective API host, falling back to environment variable or default if not set.
